DISCLAIMER:
This notice system is not intended to provide legal notice of the date, time, or agenda of meetings held by the Board of Supervisors or its committees. The Board of Supervisors complies with the notice requirements of the Brown Act and the Sunshine Ordinance by posting meeting agendas at this link. If you are interested in confirming whether or when an item will be heard by the Board, please consult the agenda posted in those locations.
